---
title: "The Rev. Francis North, 6th Earl of Guilford"
---

## The Rev. Francis North, 6th Earl of Guilford

**Dates:** (1772-1861)

### Description

pluralist, son of the Bishop of Winchester

### Biography

He succeeded his distant cousin the fifth earl of Guilford in 1827. He was Master of St. Cross Hospital, Rector of St. Mary\'s, Southampton, and of Old Alresford, New Alresford and Medstead, mentioned by CMY (16 Jan 1854).  He was a notorious pluralist and sparked the debates which gave rise to Trollope’s <i>The Warden</i>.

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 16th [1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
